---
title: "SSC Irrigation Management trials in Turkey - 2025 Season"
author: "Naharajan Lakshmanaperumal, Senior Data Scientist, EMEA Agronomy"
date: "06.02.2026"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
  word_document:
    reference_docx: south_africa_variety_data_report_final.docx
  beamer_presentation: default
  pdf_document: default
  slidy_presentation: default
always_allow_html: yes
---

# Contents

<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- SSC irrigation Management Trials

- Data Summary

- Exploratory data analysis - Replicate Clustering based on Plot level observations, Soil characteristics and Drone data

- Statistical data analysis using linear mixed effect models - ANOVA, Oulier detection and marginal means (lsmeans) comparison
  
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# SSC Irrigation Management Trials 

- **To understand and characterize the interaction of irrigation management and plant density on SSC and Tall Corn hybrids in Turkey**  

```{r eval=FALSE}
## TREATMENTS   :  125 100 75 
## plant_density    :  130 95 
## HYBRIDS  :  DKC7236SC DKC6648SC DKC5685 DKC6761 
## replicate    :  3 1 2 
```


# Data Summary

## Comparison of replicates

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.height=7}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(stringr)

turkey_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/LAST-RAW-Irrigation Harvest Result.xlsx")
names(turkey_data)[6] = "replicate"

turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, !is.na(replicate))
#turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, HYBRID !="EX7210-95")

turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, !is.na(RANGE))




turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE` = as.double(turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`)

turkey_data$dry_yield_t_ha = turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`

turkey_data = turkey_data %>% unite(range_column, RANGE, COLUMN, sep="_", remove=F)

iwp_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/IWP.xlsx")

iwp_data = iwp_data %>% unite(range_column, RANGE, COLUMN, sep="_", remove=F)

iwp_data = iwp_data[,c(1,10)]

turkey_data = inner_join(turkey_data,iwp_data)
turkey_data$range_column=NULL
#corrected data from Mustafa

#turkey_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/LAST-RAW-irrigation_percent Trial Harvest Results.xlsx")
#names(turkey_data)[4] = "replicate"

#turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, !is.na(replicate))
#turkey_data = filter(turkey_data, HYBRID !="EX7210-95")

#turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE` = as.double(turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`)

#turkey_data$dry_yield_t_ha = turkey_data$`YIELD TON / HA IN 15 MOISTURE`


#turkey_data_irr = turkey_data_irr %>% mutate(volumn_water_applied_mm3_ha = ifelse(TREATMENTS=="FLOWERING 75",748,ifelse(TREATMENTS=="TOTAL 75",676,ifelse(TREATMENTS=="STANDART 100",803,ifelse(TREATMENTS=="HIGH 125",1004,NA)))))

#turkey_data = turkey_data %>% mutate(N_uptake_efficiency_t_kg=dry_yield_t_ha/`N DOSE TOTAL` )
#turkey_data = turkey_data %>% mutate(N_use_efficiency_kg_t=APPLICATION/dry_yield_t_ha)

#turkey_data = turkey_data %>% mutate(plant_density = ifelse(HYBRID %in% c("EX6658", "EW6846"),"130K","95K"))


turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:27,327,196,197,200,271,272,275,328)]

turkey_data_long = turkey_data_yield %>% gather(type,value, 7:35)


names(turkey_data_long)[5] = "application"




turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("dry_yield_t_ha"))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(application))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Irrigation percent")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("EAR HEIGHT"))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(application))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Irrigation percent")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c( "PLANT HEIGHT" ))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(application))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Irrigation percent")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")



turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c( "MOISTURE" ))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(application))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Irrigation percent")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")


turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c( "FLOWERING" ))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(application))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Irrigation percent")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c( "TEST WEIGHT" ))

turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )

ggplot(turkey_data_long_1, aes(as.factor(as.integer(as.character(application))),value,fill=as.factor(replicate)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+facet_grid(HYBRID~type, scales="free")+theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
                                                                                                                                                                                                     axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') )+xlab("Irrigation percent")+ggtitle("Replicate comparison")
# ssc_data = read_excel("/mnt/data/ALL DATA WATER 2023_NAHA.xlsx", sheet = 8)
# 
# names(ssc_data)[29] = "A_Photosynthesis"
# names(ssc_data)[28] = "gs_Stomatal_conductance"
# names(ssc_data)[27] = "E_Transpiration"
# names(ssc_data)[26] = "ci_Substomatal_cavity_CO2_conc_umol_per_mol"
# names(ssc_data)[21] = "Tleaf_leaf_surface_temperature"
# names(ssc_data)[14] = "Qleaf_irradiance_on_the_leaf_plane_µmol_per_sqm_per_sec"
# names(ssc_data)[4] = "productName"
# 
# 
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid_brand = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),"dekalb","pcm4"),hybrid_name = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),str_sub(productName, 1, 7),str_sub(productName, 1, 6)), relative_maturity=ifelse(hybrid_brand=="dekalb",as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 4, 5))+50,as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 3, 4))+50),maturity_group = ifelse(relative_maturity<88,"early",ifelse(relative_maturity>=102,"late","mid")))
# 
# 
# ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
#  
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))
# ssc_data$year = 2023
# ssc_data$country = "greece"
# ssc_data$trial_source = "External"
# names(ssc_data)[1] = "Location"
# names(ssc_data)[5] = "density_seeds_per_ha"
# names(ssc_data)[6] = "interrow_width_cm"
# names(ssc_data)[35] = "hybrid"
# names(ssc_data)[7] = "irrigation"
# 
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(irrigation_percent = ifelse(irrigation == 100,100,75))
# 
# ssc_data = ssc_data %>% group_by(Location,irrigation_percent,productName) %>% mutate(Replicate = row_number())
# 
# ssc_data$irrigation = as.factor(ssc_data$irrigation)
# ssc_data$irrigation_percent = as.factor(ssc_data$irrigation_percent)
# ssc_data$hybrid = as.factor(ssc_data$hybrid)
# ssc_data$Replicate = as.factor(ssc_data$Replicate)
# 
# ssc_data$Protocol = "SSC - Water management trials"
# 
# ssc_data_yield = read_excel("/mnt/data/ALL DATA WATER 2023_NAHA.xlsx", sheet = 7)
# 
# names(ssc_data_yield)[5] = "productName"
# 
# ssc_data_yield = ssc_data_yield %>% mutate(hybrid_brand = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),"dekalb","pcm4"),hybrid = ifelse(startsWith(productName,"D"),str_sub(productName, 1, 7),str_sub(productName, 1, 6)), relative_maturity=ifelse(hybrid_brand=="dekalb",as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 4, 5))+50,as.numeric(str_sub(productName, 3, 4))+50),maturity_group = ifelse(relative_maturity<88,"early",ifelse(relative_maturity>=102,"late","mid")))
# 
# ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
#  
# ssc_data_yield = ssc_data_yield %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))
# ssc_data_yield$year = 2023
# ssc_data_yield$country = "greece"
# ssc_data_yield$trial_source = "External"
# names(ssc_data_yield)[1] = "Location"
# names(ssc_data_yield)[2] = "density_seeds_per_ha"
# names(ssc_data_yield)[3] = "interrow_width_cm"
# names(ssc_data_yield)[6] = "yield_t_per_ha"
# 
# names(ssc_data_yield)[4] = "irrigation"
# 
# ssc_data_yield = ssc_data_yield %>% mutate(irrigation_percent = ifelse(irrigation == "S",75,100))
# 
# ssc_data_yield = ssc_data_yield %>% group_by(interrow_width_cm,productName) %>% mutate(Replicate = row_number())
# 
# ssc_data_yield$irrigation_percent = as.factor(ssc_data_yield$irrigation_percent)
# ssc_data_yield$hybrid = as.factor(ssc_data_yield$hybrid)
# ssc_data_yield$Replicate = as.factor(ssc_data_yield$Replicate)
# 
# ssc_data_yield$Protocol = "SSC - Water management trials"
#

# 
# ssc_water_past$irrigation_percent = as.factor(ssc_water_past$irrigation_percent)
# ssc_water_past$Replicate = as.factor(ssc_water_past$Replicate)
# 
# ssc_water_past = ssc_water_past %>% mutate(hybrid_brand = ifelse(startsWith(hybrid,"D"),"dekalb","pcm4"),hybrid = ifelse(startsWith(hybrid,"D"),str_sub(hybrid, 1, 7),str_sub(hybrid, 1, 6)), relative_maturity=ifelse(hybrid_brand=="dekalb",as.numeric(str_sub(hybrid, 4, 5))+50,as.numeric(str_sub(hybrid, 3, 4))+50),maturity_group = ifelse(relative_maturity<88,"early",ifelse(relative_maturity>=102,"late","mid")))
# 
# ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
#  
# ssc_water_past = ssc_water_past %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))
# 
# ssc_data$gs_Stomatal_conductance = as.character(ssc_data$gs_Stomatal_conductance)
# ssc_data$A_Photosynthesis = as.character(ssc_data$A_Photosynthesis)
# 
# ssc_data_all = bind_rows(ssc_water_past,ssc_data_yield,ssc_data)
# 
# ssc_data_all = ssc_data_all %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(hybrid =="EW6436", "EW6436XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6846", "EW6846XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6015", "EW6015XKL1",hybrid))))
# 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),"DKC6402", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),"DKC6980", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm"),"EW6436", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 40Cm","SSC2 80 Cm"),"EW6846", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC3 40 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),"EW6015","NA"))))))
# # 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(interrow_width = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),80, ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),80, ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 80 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),80, ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC2 40Cm","SSC3 40 Cm"),40,"NA")))))
# # 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(interrow_width_cm = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),"80 cm", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),"80 cm", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 80 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),"80 cm", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC2 40Cm","SSC3 40 Cm"),"40 cm","NA")))))
# # 
# # ssc_data = ssc_data %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6402"),"DKC6402", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("DKC 6980"),"DKC6980", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC1 40 Cm","SSC1 80 Cm"),"EW6436", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC2 40Cm","SSC2 80 Cm"),"EW6846", ifelse(Hybrids %in% c("SSC3 40 Cm","SSC3 80 Cm"),"EW6015","NA"))))))
# 
# 
# ssc_data_all = ssc_data_all %>% unite(hybrid_interrow_width_cm,hybrid_name,interrow_width_cm, sep="_", remove=F )
# #Target_density	Nitrogen	Interrow	number_points	mean_dry_yield	mean_moisture_percent	Trial	country	sub_country	year
# 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data
# # ssc_data_write$Protocol = "SSC - Water management trials"
# # ssc_data_write$year = 2022
# # ssc_data_write$Hybrids = NULL
# # ssc_data_write$hybrid_interrow_width_cm = NULL
# # ssc_data_write$Comments = NULL
# # ssc_data_write$interrow_width_cm = NULL 
# # names(ssc_data_write)[8] = "interrow_width_cm"
# # ssc_data_write$hybrid_name = NULL
# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(Replicate = ifelse(Rep == "Rep.1",1,ifelse(Rep == "Rep.2",2, ifelse(Rep=="Rep.3",3,4))))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$Rep=NULL
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$Irrigation = as.double(as.character(ssc_data_write$Irrigation))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$Irrigation = ssc_data_write$Irrigation*100
# # names(ssc_data_write)[2] = "irrigation_percent"
# # ssc_data_write$country = "spain"
# # ssc_data_write$Trial = ssc_data_write$Location 
# # ssc_data_write$trial_source = "External"
# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid %in% c("EW6436" , "EW6846" , "EW6015"), "Smart corn","Tall"))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(density_seeds_per_ha = ifelse(hybrid %in% c("EW6436" , "EW6846" , "EW6015"), 130000,80000))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(hybrid =="EW6436", "EW6436XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6846", "EW6846XKL1",ifelse(hybrid =="EW6015", "EW6015XKL1",hybrid))))
# # 
# # ssc_data_write$hybrid = NULL
# # names(ssc_data_write)[15] = "hybrid"
# #

# # 
# # ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write %>% mutate(longitude = ifelse(Location =="Majarromaque", -5.900635,ifelse(Location =="Aguas Nuevas", -1.930363,ifelse(Location =="Almansa", -1.119966,-5.980877))))
# # 
# # #ssc_data_write = ssc_data_write[,c(7,8,10,11,1,12,15,13,14,2,6,9,4,3,5)]
# 
# readr::write_csv(ssc_data_all,"/mnt/data/EMEA_SSC_Water_management_trials_data_updated.csv")


```

# Replicate Clustering 


## Clustering based on all plot level observations

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:27,327)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]
turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE = as.double(turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE )

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHALL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T),row_number= mean(  `ROW NUMBER` , na.rm=T),number_grain_per_ear= mean(  `GRAIN/EAR` , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")

rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-11])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$rep

rep_trt_1_obs = rep_trt_1

rep_trt_2 = rep_trt_1

rep_trt_2=as.data.frame(rep_trt_2)

rep_trt_2 <- rep_trt_2[,-11]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_2)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:27,327)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]
turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE = as.double(turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE )

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHALL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T),row_number= mean(  `ROW NUMBER` , na.rm=T),number_grain_per_ear= mean(  `GRAIN/EAR` , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")

rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```


### Irrigation levels

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:27,327)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]
turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE = as.double(turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE )

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(`APPLICATION (%)`) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHALL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T),row_number= mean(  `ROW NUMBER` , na.rm=T),number_grain_per_ear= mean(  `GRAIN/EAR` , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")

rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid - Density levels

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:27,327)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]
turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE = as.double(turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE )

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data_yield %>% unite(hybrid_density, HYBRID,DENSITY,sep="_",remove=F)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(`hybrid_density`) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHALL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T),row_number= mean(  `ROW NUMBER` , na.rm=T),number_grain_per_ear= mean(  `GRAIN/EAR` , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")

#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid - Irrigation levels

```{r, echo=F}

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:27,327)]
turkey_data_yield$`HARVESTED ROW NUMBER` = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`ROW DISTANCE`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Width`  = NULL
turkey_data_yield$`H Row Length`  = NULL
#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,8:32)]
turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE = as.double(turkey_data_yield$MOISTURE )

turkey_data_yield = turkey_data_yield %>% unite(hybrid_density, HYBRID,`APPLICATION (%)`,sep="_",remove=F)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(`hybrid_density`) %>% summarise(moisture_combine = mean(`MOISTURE`, na.rm=T),shell_weight = mean(`SHALL WEIGHT`, na.rm=T),ear_height = mean(`EAR HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),plant_height = mean(`PLANT HEIGHT`, na.rm=T),flowering = mean(FLOWERING, na.rm=T),ear_weight= mean( `EAR WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),test_weight_combine= mean( `TEST WEIGHT` , na.rm=T),dry_yield_t_ha= mean(  dry_yield_t_ha , na.rm=T),row_number= mean(  `ROW NUMBER` , na.rm=T),number_grain_per_ear= mean(  `GRAIN/EAR` , na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")

#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rownames(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1[,1]
rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#autoscoring <- dist(lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1) # method="man" # is a bit better
#cluster <- hclust(autoscoring, method = "complete")
#plot(cluster)


rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1)
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,show_colnames=TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

## Clustering based on Drone measurements - July 9th 


```{r, echo=F}



#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,283,284:291)]


turkey_data$`Band: Nir 07-09-2025` = as.double(turkey_data$`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(NIR_July9th = mean(`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_July9th = mean(`Band: Red 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_July9th = mean(`Index: CIG 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_July9th = mean(`Index: CIRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_July9th = mean(`Index: NDRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_July9th = mean(`Index: NDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_July9th = mean(`Index: NDWI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_July9th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)


DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")



rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
rep_trt_1=as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$rep)

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid

```{r, echo=F}



#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,283,284:291)]


turkey_data$`Band: Nir 07-09-2025` = as.double(turkey_data$`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(NIR_July9th = mean(`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_July9th = mean(`Band: Red 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_July9th = mean(`Index: CIG 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_July9th = mean(`Index: CIRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_July9th = mean(`Index: NDRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_July9th = mean(`Index: NDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_July9th = mean(`Index: NDWI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_July9th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)


DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")



#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)

rep_trt_1=as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$HYBRID)

rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}



rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Irrigation levels

```{r, echo=F}



#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,283,284:291)]


turkey_data$`Band: Nir 07-09-2025` = as.double(turkey_data$`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data %>% group_by(`APPLICATION (%)`) %>% summarise(NIR_July9th = mean(`Band: Nir 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_July9th = mean(`Band: Red 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_July9th = mean(`Index: CIG 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_July9th = mean(`Index: CIRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_July9th = mean(`Index: NDRE 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_July9th = mean(`Index: NDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_July9th = mean(`Index: NDWI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_July9th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)



DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")


#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)

rep_trt_1=as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$`APPLICATION (%)`)

rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}



rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

## Clustering based on Drone measurements - 17th September 


```{r echo=F}



#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,367:375)]


turkey_data$`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`=as.double(turkey_data$`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(NIR_Sept17th = mean(`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_Sept17th= mean(`Band: Red 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_Sept17th = mean(`Index: CIG 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: CIRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: NDWI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)

DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")




rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-9])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
rep_trt_1 =as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$rep)

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-9]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=FALSE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid

```{r echo=F}



#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,367:375)]


turkey_data$`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`=as.double(turkey_data$`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(NIR_Sept17th = mean(`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_Sept17th= mean(`Band: Red 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_Sept17th = mean(`Index: CIG 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: CIRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: NDWI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")


rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$HYBRID)


#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=FALSE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Irrigation levels

```{r echo=F}



#turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,367:375)]


turkey_data$`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`=as.double(turkey_data$`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data %>% group_by(`APPLICATION (%)`) %>% summarise(NIR_Sept17th = mean(`Band: Nir 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),Red_Sept17th= mean(`Band: Red 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIG_Sept17th = mean(`Index: CIG 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),CIRE_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: CIRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDRE_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDRE 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: NDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),NDWI_Sept17thh = mean(`Index: NDWI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T),GNDVI_Sept17th = mean(`Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)


rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
row.names(rep_trt_1) = as.factor(rep_trt_1$`APPLICATION (%)`)

DT::datatable(rep_trt_1,filter="top")

#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}


rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=FALSE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

## Clustering based on soil characteristics at planting

```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,40,49,58)]

turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(replicate) %>% summarise(soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture %...40`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture %...49`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture %...58`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1, filter="top")
rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL


rep_trt_1_soil=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-4])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$rep

rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-4]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid


```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,40,49,58)]

turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(HYBRID) %>% summarise(soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture %...40`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture %...49`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture %...58`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1, filter="top")
row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$HYBRID
#rep_trt_1_soil=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}



rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### APPLICATION (%)


```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,40,49,58)]

turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58`)


rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(`APPLICATION (%)`) %>% summarise(soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture %...40`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture %...49`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture %...58`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL
DT::datatable(rep_trt_1, filter="top")
row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$`APPLICATION (%)`
#rep_trt_1_soil=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}



rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid - density levels


```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,40,49,58)]

turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58`)
turkey_data_yield = turkey_data_yield %>% unite(hybrid_density_application, HYBRID,DENSITY, sep="_",remove=T)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(`hybrid_density_application`) %>% summarise(soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture %...40`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture %...49`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture %...58`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$`hybrid_density_application`
#rep_trt_1_soil=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}



rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```

### Hybrid - Irrigation levels


```{r, echo=F}



turkey_data_yield = turkey_data[,c(1:7,40,49,58)]

turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...40`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...49`)
turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58` = as.double(turkey_data_yield$`Soil Moisture %...58`)
turkey_data_yield = turkey_data_yield %>% unite(hybrid_density_application, HYBRID,`APPLICATION (%)`, sep="_",remove=T)

rep_trt_1 = turkey_data_yield %>% group_by(`hybrid_density_application`) %>% summarise(soil_moisture_planting = mean(`Soil Moisture %...40`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_application = mean(`Soil Moisture %...49`, na.rm=T),soil_moisture_harvest = mean(`Soil Moisture %...58`, na.rm=T), .groups ="drop") #%>% unite(trt,HYBRID, DENSITY,APPLICATION ) #%>% pivot_wider(names_from=trt, values_from=Total_Nitrogen)
rep_trt_1 = as.data.frame(rep_trt_1)
#rep_trt_1  = rep_trt_1 %>% mutate(rep = paste("Rep_",replicate, sep=""))
#rep_trt_1$replicate = NULL

row.names(rep_trt_1) = rep_trt_1$`hybrid_density_application`
#rep_trt_1_soil=rep_trt_1


#lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test_1 = lsmeans_final_with_rank_2_test %>% spread(trait_code,final_rank)



rep_mat = as.matrix(rep_trt_1[,-1])
#rep_mat$trt = NULL
rep_mat_scaled = scale(rep_mat)

hc = hclust(dist(rep_mat_scaled), method="ward.D2")
plot(hc, main="replicate clustering")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}



rep_trt_1 <- rep_trt_1[,-1]

#pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(rep_trt_1),  scale="column",cluster_cols = FALSE,show_rownames=TRUE, color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50))
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
pheatmap::pheatmap(as.matrix(t(rep_trt_1)),  scale="row",cluster_cols = TRUE,color=colorRampPalette(c("green", "white", "red"))(50),display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_color = "black", 
         fontsize_number = 8)
```


# Statistical analysis 

## Model outliers detection

1) **outlier analysis: By location mixed effect model**

- Model used: Linear mixed effect (LME) ANOVA model using R

- Fixed variable: HYBRIDS , plant_density, TREATMENTS, HYBRIDS:plant_density:TREATMENTS

- Random variables: replicate, replicate:HYBRIDS,replicate:plant_density,replicate:TREATMENTS







```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
###Function which flags plot values with DSR > threshold for DSR traits 
data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location = function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(type == traits[i])
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(HYBRID)  * as.factor(plant_density) *as.factor(APPLICATION)+ (1|replicate)+ (1|replicate:HYBRID)+ (1|replicate:plant_density)+(1|replicate:APPLICATION)+(1|replicate:HYBRID:plant_density),data=temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}
#model SSC vs DKC
model_ssc_dkc = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
 mmod <- lmer(value ~ Irrigation  * hybrid + (1|Location/Rep)+ (1|Location:Irrigation)+ +(1|Location:Irrigation:hybrid) ,data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
#plot_lsmeans(lsm1.df)

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
 
 print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  

  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}

#model ssc vs dkc low yielding
model_ssc_dkc_low = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
  mmod <- lmer(value ~ Irrigation  * hybrid + (1|Rep) ,data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
#plot_lsmeans(lsm1.df)

  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:hybrid)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
 
 print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  

  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}

#


#lsmeans, delta for ssc only
model_ssc_only = function(ssc_data_no_nas_ssc){
 mmod = lmer(value ~ as.factor(HYBRIDS)  * as.factor(TREATMENTS) + (1|replicate)+ (1|replicate:HYBRIDS),data=ssc_data_no_nas_ssc)
 
 #print(anova(mmod))
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~HYBRIDS:TREATMENTS)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)
  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  

delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  return(list(anv,lsm1.df,delta1.df))
 
}


#across location

across_location = function(data_df_long){
  traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  analysis_type="Across locations"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, type == traits[i])
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
   model = lmer(value ~ irrigation_percent  * hybrid_interrow_width_cm + (1|Location/Replicate)+ (1|Location:irrigation_percent)+ +(1|Location:irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm) ,data=temp)
    anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
    anova_table$Field = NULL
    anova_table$Trait= traits[i]
     anova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      lsm.df = create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm.df$Trait= traits[i]
     lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta.df = create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta.df$Trait= traits[i]
    delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}

create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new = function(model,test.set,field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  #Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$Protocol),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  names(lsm1.df)[1] = "Level"
  #print(names(lsm1.df))
  lsm1.df = data.frame(lsm1.df$Level,lsm1.df$hybrid_interrow_width_cm,lsm1.df$lsmean,lsm1.df$SE,lsm1.df$df,lsm1.df$lower.CL,lsm1.df$upper.CL,lsm1.df$.group)
  names(lsm1.df) = c("Factor","Group1","lsmean","SE","DF","Lower_CI","Upper_CI","Group")
  lsm1.df$Field = field
  lsm1.df$analysis_type=analysis_type
  lsm1.df= lsm1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  return(lsm1.df)
}

create_anova_table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  anv = as.data.frame(anova(model))
  Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(model)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  anv$Field = field
  anv$analysis_type = analysis_type
  
anv = anv %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(`Pr(>F)`<0.05, "Significant","Not significant"))
#https://davidgohel.github.io/flextable/articles/format.html
#print(names(anv))
anv = anv[c(9,10,2,3,5:8,11)]
 # anova.table$Num.Fields = n.fields
#  anova.table$Trait = trait.name
  #colnames(anova.table) = c("Protocol","Effect","numDF","denDF","F-value","P-value","CV")
  #anv$field=field
  
  return(anv)
}


create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)
  delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  
  ## separating contrast column to treatment 1 and treatment 2
  
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  ## Parsing the Contrast column and generating the first and second columns
  # contrast.rcbd = as.character(delta1.df$contrast)
  # V1 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # V2 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # for(j in 1:dim(delta1.df)[1]){
  #   contrast.part = strsplit(contrast.rcbd[j]," - ")
  #   V1[j] = contrast.part[[1]][1]
  #   V2[j] = contrast.part[[1]][2]
  # }
  # delta1.df = data.frame(Protocol,Set,Factor,V1,V2,delta1.df$estimate,delta1.df$p.value) 
  # delta1.df$sig.1 = ifelse(delta1.df$delta1.df.p.value<0.1,TRUE,FALSE)
  # names(delta1.df) = c("Protocol","Set","Factor","V1","V2","Diff","Pvalue","Sig_At_10percent")
  #delta1.df$Observation = field
  delta1.df$Field=field
  delta1.df$analysis_type = analysis_type
  return(delta1.df)
}

# ssc_data_model = ssc_data_all[,c(1:14,32,39,44:47,52)]
# ssc_data_model = filter(ssc_data_model, country=="greece")
# #ssc_data_model_1 = filter(ssc_data_model, )
# ssc_data_long = ssc_data_model%>% gather(type, value, 14:20)
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long,type!="yield_t_per_ha")
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long, !is.na(value))
# ssc_data_long$value = as.double(ssc_data_long$value )
# traits = unique(ssc_data_long$type)
# all_locations = unique(ssc_data_all$Location)
# ssc_data_outlier = data.frame()
#   for (i in 1:length(all_locations)){
#   
#   outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(ssc_data_long,3.5)
#   table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)
#   ssc_data_outlier = rbind(ssc_data_outlier,outlier_data )
#   }
names(turkey_data_long)[4] = "plant_density"
names(turkey_data_long)[5] = "APPLICATION"

turkey_data_long_1 = filter(turkey_data_long, type %in% c("dry_yield_t_ha","MOISTURE","EAR WEIGHT","EAR HEIGHT","PLANT HEIGHT" ,"GRAIN/EAR","GRAIN WEIGHT","TEST WEIGHT","Index: CIRE 07-09-2025","Index: NDRE 07-09-2025","Index: GNDVI 07-09-2025" ,"Index: CIRE 09-17-2025","Index: NDRE 09-17-2025" ,"Index: GNDVI 09-17-2025","IWP (kg/m3)"))

#turkey_data_irr_long_1 = turkey_data_irr_long_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

traits = unique(turkey_data_long_1$type)
turkey_data_long_1$value = as.double(turkey_data_long_1$value )
#turkey_data_irr_long$value = as.double(turkey_data_irr_long$value )
  outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(turkey_data_long_1,3.5)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)


ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(outlier_data, filter="top")

```






```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10,fig.width=10}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$HYBRIDS = as.factor(ssc_data$HYBRID )
ssc_data$TREATMENTS = as.factor(ssc_data$APPLICATION)
ssc_data$replicate  = as.factor(ssc_data$replicate  )
ssc_data$plant_density  = as.factor(ssc_data$plant_density  )
#ssc_data = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1","2"))

#STANDART 100


#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```




## Statistical analysis of yield 


 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="dry_yield_t_ha")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (Dry yield, t/ha)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of IWP (kg/m3) 


 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="IWP (kg/m3)")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (IWP (kg/m3))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (IWP (kg/m3))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (IWP (kg/m3))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (IWP (kg/m3))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (IWP (kg/m3))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
```
