```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 1, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (IWP (kg/m3))")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 1, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of MOISTURE 




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="MOISTURE")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (MOISTURE, %)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (MOISTURE, %)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (MOISTURE, %)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (MOISTURE, %)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (MOISTURE, %)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (MOISTURE, %)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```


## Statistical analysis of TEST WEIGHT 




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="TEST WEIGHT")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (TEST WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (TEST WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (TEST WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (TEST WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (TEST WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (TEST WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```


## Statistical analysis of EAR WEIGHT 




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="EAR WEIGHT")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```

## Statistical analysis of GRAIN WEIGHT 




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="GRAIN WEIGHT")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN WEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```


## Statistical analysis of GRAIN/EAR 




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="GRAIN/EAR")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN/EART)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN/EAR)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN/EAR)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN/EAR)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN/EAR)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (GRAIN/EAR)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```


## Statistical analysis of EAR HEIGHT 




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="EAR HEIGHT")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% group_by(hybrid__Target_density) %>% mutate(rank=row_number()) %>% filter(rank==1)


#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (EAR HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```


## Statistical analysis of PLANT HEIGHT




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="PLANT HEIGHT")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (PLANT HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (PLANT HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (PLANT HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)

# Interaction (varieties:fertilizer)
LSD_ABC = LSD.test(y = value,
                  trt = as.factor(HYBRIDS):as.factor(plant_density):as.factor(TREATMENTS),
                  DFerror = model$gl.c,
                  MSerror = model$Ec,
                  alpha = 0.1,
                  p.adj = "BH",
                  group = TRUE,
                  console = TRUE)




lsmeans = LSD_ABC$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_ABC)
groups = LSD_ABC$groups
groups$hybrid__Target_density = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)


pd <- position_dodge(0.1)



lsmeans = lsmeans %>% separate(hybrid__Target_density, into=c("hybrid","density","irrigation_percent"),sep=":",remove=F)

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% group_by(hybrid__Target_density) %>% mutate(rank=row_number()) %>% filter(rank==1)

#lsmeans = lsmeans %>% mutate(stress = ifelse(Irrigation_percent =="100","NS","S"))

lsmeans = lsmeans %>% unite(hybrid__density,hybrid,density, sep="_",remove=F)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid__Target_density,-value),value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (PLANT HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(hybrid__Target_density,value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (PLANT HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 5, group = hybrid), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))
print(plot_lsmeans)

lsmeans_1 = lsmeans %>% mutate(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot = ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:75","01_DKC5685:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:100","02_DKC5685:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:130:125","03_DKC5685:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:75","04_DKC5685:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:100","05_DKC5685:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC5685:95:125","06_DKC5685:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:75","07_DKC6648SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:100","08_DKC6648SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:130:125","09_DKC6648SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:75","10_DKC6648SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:100","11_DKC6648SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6648SC:95:125","12_DKC6648SC:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:75","13_DKC6761:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:100","14_DKC6761:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:130:125","15_DKC6761:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:75","16_DKC6761:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:100","17_DKC6761:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC6761:95:125","18_DKC6761:95K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:75","19_DKC7236SC:130K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:100","20_DKC7236SC:130K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:130:125","21_DKC7236SC:130K:125%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:75","22_DKC7236SC:95K:75%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:100","23_DKC7236SC:95K:100%",ifelse(hybrid__Target_density == "DKC7236SC:95:125","24_DKC7236SC:95K:125%",hybrid__Target_density)))))))))))))))))))))))))



#print(plot_lsmeans)

#write_csv(lsmeans,paste(trial_id, "Grain_dry_yield_statistical_means.csv",sep="_"))





```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=15}
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_1,aes(hybrid__interrow_cm_plot,value, fill=irrigation_percent))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid_density_irrigation")+ylab(" LSMeans (PLANT HEIGHT)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) +geom_text(aes(label = groups, y = 2, group = hybrid__interrow_cm_plot), vjust = -0.2, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+facet_grid(~hybrid__density, scales="free_x")
print(plot_lsmeans)

```


## Statistical analysis of CIRE

NDRE tracks canopy reflectance using a red‑edge band. Sensitive to chlorophyll and canopy structure, and less likely to saturate than NDVI at high leaf area index (LAI). Good for mid–late season biomass and N status.

GNDVI tuned to chlorophyll (green band). Sensitive to chlorophyll content and early stress, but more influenced by soil/background and illumination.


CIRE — a ratio chlorophyll index. Very sensitive to small chlorophyll changes, useful for N estimation and fine gradients; unbounded and very responsive to small RE differences.


### "Index: CIRE 07-09-2025" 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=10, fig.width=14}
#ssc_data_no_1 = filter(ssc_data, !replicate %in% c("1"))

ssc_data_1 = filter(ssc_data,type=="Index: CIRE 07-09-2025")

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% mutate(hybrid_name = ifelse(HYBRID =="EX6658-95","EX6658",ifelse(HYBRID =="EW6846-95","EW6846",HYBRID)))

#ssc_data_1 = ssc_data_1 %>% separate(HYBRIDS, into=c("hybrid_name","plant_density"),sep="_",remove=F)

library(agricolae)
model<-with(ssc_data_1,ssp.plot(replicate,TREATMENTS,plant_density,HYBRIDS,value ))
gla<-model$gl.a; glb<-model$gl.b; glc<-model$gl.c
Ea<-model$Ea; Eb<-model$Eb; Ec<-model$Ec
op<-par(mfrow=c(1,3),cex=0.6)
out1<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,HYBRIDS,gla,Ea,console=TRUE))
out2<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,plant_density,glb,Eb,console=TRUE))
out3<-with(ssc_data_1,LSD.test(value,TREATMENTS,glc,Ec,console=TRUE))
#plot(out1,xlab="hybrid_name",las=1,variation="IQR")
#plot(out2,xlab="plant_density",variation="IQR")
#plot(out3,xlab="Fertilization_level",variation="IQR")
attach(ssc_data_1)

LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = HYBRIDS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("Hybrid")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = plant_density,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("plant_density")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text(angle=90, size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=round(value,2)), position=pd, vjust=0.05,hjust=0.5, size=3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(  vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=value-std, ymax=value+std), width=.2,
                 position=position_dodge(.9)) 
print(plot_lsmeans)


LSD_A = LSD.test(y = value,
                 trt = TREATMENTS,
                 DFerror = model$gl.a,
                 MSerror = model$Ea,
                 alpha = 0.1,
                 p.adj = "BH",
                 group = TRUE,
                 console = TRUE)

lsmeans = LSD_A$means
lsmeans$hybrid = rownames(LSD_A)
groups = LSD_A$groups
groups$hybrid = rownames(groups)
 
lsmeans = inner_join(lsmeans,groups)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
 
 
#lsmeans$hybrid <- factor(lsmeans$hybrid,levels = c("20000", "30000", "40000", "50000"))
 
 
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans,aes(reorder(hybrid ,-value),value, fill=groups))+geom_bar(stat="identity")+xlab("TREATMENTS")+ylab(" LSMeans (Index: CIRE 07-09-2025)")+
  #theme_classic() +
```
